violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Hood filters must be cleaned of buildup. - Current hood does not have grease filters above flat top griddle or 2 burner cooktop.

Plumbing system. — --Longer faucet needed on sink in wait station so reaches 2 sinks. One basin for dump sink for espresso, one for handwash sink. * If water outlet by drain for mop water used for water fill, will need a backflow device. * Recommend install curb around this drain to corral water when emptying mop bucket.
Toilet facilities. — --Employee and men's must have self closing doors.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Wait area: replace carpet with linoleum available. Cover the plywood flooring under the counter. Seal around drainline under triple basin sink. Continue work on repairing walls, floors, and ceilings as needed.
Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Mop head was found in the mop bucket instead of hung to dry.
